results.rendered_html:
2. atūrta (wie eben)
1〉 adj. unübertroffen, unvergleichlich: rājā  ṚV. 1,126,1 . atūrtaṃ śrāvayatpatiṃ putraṃ dadāti dāśuṣe 5,25,5 .  NIR. 9,10 . 10,32 .
— 2〉 n. das Unüberschrittene, der unüberschrittene Raum: aśvamivādhukṣaddhunimantarikṣamatūrte baddhaṃ savitā samudram  ṚV. 10,149,1 .

results.rendered_html:
atūrta a. [na tūryate, tur-hiṃsāyāṃ] Ved. Not obstructed or stopped or injured, unhurt.
— rtaṃ The unlimited space, sky.
Comp.
— dakṣa a. Ved. whose plans cannot be obstructed or are unhurt.
— pathin a. Ved. whose path cannot be obstructed.
